---

name: Add Interview Questions
about: Contribute new interview questions and answers
title: "[QUESTIONS] Add questions for "
labels: documentation, good first issue
assignees: ''
-------------

## Topic

Example:

* Python
* Machine Learning
* NLP
* RAG
* LangGraph
* Agentic AI

## Difficulty Level

* [ ] Beginner
* [ ] Intermediate
* [ ] Advanced

## Number of Questions Added

Example: 10

## Checklist

* [ ] Questions are relevant to the topic
* [ ] Answers are included
* [ ] Proper markdown formatting used
* [ ] No duplicate questions
